taxonomy: Scepocarpus obovatus is classified as a species within the family Proteaceae. It belongs to the genus Scepocarpus, which is a part of the plant kingdom. benefits: Scepocarpus obovatus, a plant native to Australia, has been traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties.
